title: Semantic Reference Authoring
summary: Feature parent for possible semantic-reference authoring enhancements beyond the shipped editor.
content_html:
Semantic Reference Authoring

Purpose

Group possible authoring improvements beyond the current Semantic References Editor without treating every idea as one v2 delivery.

Current Feature

The shipped editor, registry, rendering, and audit behavior is documented in:

  • Semantic References Editor
  • Semantic References Implementation
  • Semantic References

Those durable documents and the code are the authority for v1.

Proposed Feature Documents

  • Concept — possible authoring improvements and product boundaries.
  • Architecture — current extension method, proposed pressure points, and public/write boundaries.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — suggested feature order.

No delivery is active. Promote one useful outcome only when it becomes important; do not reopen a permanent “v2 backlog.”
